_readme: Brightcove Gateway is pre-configured and auto-connects on plugin install. Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Notion, and Granola are OAuth connectors — each rep connects these once via Claude Desktop → Settings → Integrations by signing into their Google/Notion account.

_oauth_connectors_required.gmail: Connect via Claude Desktop → Settings → Integrations → Gmail (sign in with Google)
_oauth_connectors_required.google-calendar: Connect via Claude Desktop → Settings → Integrations → Google Calendar (sign in with Google)
_oauth_connectors_required.google-drive: Connect via Claude Desktop → Settings → Integrations → Google Drive (sign in with Google) — used for reading files only, not for output
_oauth_connectors_required.notion: Connect via Claude Desktop → Settings → Integrations → Notion (sign in with Brightcove Notion)
_oauth_connectors_required.granola: OPTIONAL — Connect via Claude Desktop → Settings → Integrations → Granola (enables real-time call companion)
